{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032304482959630993F0C5705BC074"}"},"total":1237},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7329818150581830462","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"写的很不错，感觉我看那么多集柯学还是有用武之地[捂脸]，但第二卷开始有点没转换过来，应该是看太入神了，脑袋里总会把第二卷的人物和第一卷重叠。总的来说很好看，脑袋就像在放动漫一样。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1706609059,"group_id":"7245715100152105999","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"单机日更30000字，不会作诗也会吟","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2Ny6Gd+FHMdcpUWOC0ZFjA1swrLAKikS/U7048vUInMy8","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/f47b5228df45497fbc48305e66df2abf~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776793967&x-signature=td2pIQzBGxrAjjQWfMvw1sjB6uI%3D","user_id":"1406966888411224","user_name":"了然后"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1406966888411224","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1771298311,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#E1DDFF","can_worn":false,"id":5,"name":"前排催更","small_url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/dda89d247c75fa9dfdf08a80bd508401","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/b9a497dac48a9ee6b81051a70c630d0f"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7245715100152105999","book_info":{"abstract":"【悬疑+推理+智斗+解密+脑洞+异能】
林逸前去参加高中同学聚会。
聚会上，原本一切正常，许久不见的同学们热闹的聊着天。
有人在地上捡到一张照片！
一开始，大家都没有在意。
谁想到，很快，照片上那个同学意外死了。
接着，一个又一个同学接连意外死亡！
大家都害怕极了，这一切到底是怎么回事？
还会有人死吗？
谁又是下一个？
